tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
    edit "UbuntuComputer"
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall addrgrp
    edit "ALLOW_WEB_EXCEPT_EXFIL"
        set member "all"
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "UBUNTU_ALLOW_WEB"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set action accept
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Allow required outbound web traffic from UbuntuComputer"
    next
    edit 0
        set name "UBUNTU_DENY_OTHER_OUTBOUND"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set action deny
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Block arbitrary outbound traffic from UbuntuComputer"
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     edit "UbuntuComputer"
new entry 'UbuntuComputer' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuComputer) #         set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255 .255

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuComputer) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall addrgrp

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (addrgrp) #     edit "ALLOW_WEB_EXCEPT_EXFIL"
new entry 'ALLOW_WEB_EXCEPT_EXFIL' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (ALLOW_WEB_EXCEPT~FIL) #         set member "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (ALLOW_WEB_EXCEPT~FIL) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (addrgrp) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 0
new entry '0' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set name "UBUNTU_ALLOW_WEB"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set action accept

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set nat enable

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set comments "Allow required outbound web traff ic from UbuntuComputer"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 0
new entry '0' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set name "UBUNTU_DENY_OTHER_OUTBOUND"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set service "ALL"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set comments "Block arbitrary outbound traffic  from UbuntuComputer"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "UBUNTU_ALLOW_WEB"
        set uuid 1b461e10-29cc-51f1-4fff-ff1690637e27
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic all
set nat enable
        set comments "Allow required outbound web traffic from UbuntuComputer"
    next
    edit 3
        set name "UBUNTU_DENY_OTHER_OUTBOUND"
        set uuid 1b7b9824-29cc-51f1-2dc8-0af6ab57c707
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Block arbitrary outbound traffic from UbuntuComputer"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
